attributes.event.name: codex.tool_result
attributes.arguments:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /Users/james/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Code/live-code-bench/LiveCodeBench/native-codex-gpt-5.6-sol-ultrafast-q1-inference-2026-07-13_143151/q1_abc387_f/solution.py
+import sys
+from collections import deque
+
+
+MOD = 998244353
+
+
+def solve() -> None:
+    input = sys.stdin.buffer.readline
+    n, m = map(int, input().split())
+    parent = [x - 1 for x in map(int, input().split())]
+
+    # indegree[v] is the number of vertices whose outgoing edge ends at v.
+    # Repeatedly removing indegree-zero vertices leaves exactly the cycles.
+    indegree = [0] * n
+    for v in parent:
+        indegree[v] += 1
+
+    queue = deque(i for i in range(n) if indegree[i] == 0)
+
+    # If acc[v] is not None, acc[v][k-1] is the product of the
+    # contributions of the already processed child subtrees when x_v = k.
+    acc = [None] * n
+
+    while queue:
+        v = queue.popleft()
+        ways = acc[v]
+        acc[v] = None
+
+        # Convert ways for a fixed x_v into the contribution to v's parent:
+        # x_v may be any value not exceeding the parent's value.
+        if ways is None:
+            contribution = list(range(1, m + 1))
+        else:
+            prefix = 0
+            for k in range(m):
+                prefix += ways[k]
+                if prefix >= MOD:
+                    prefix -= MOD
+                ways[k] = prefix
+            contribution = ways
+
+        p = parent[v]
+        if acc[p] is None:
+            acc[p] = contribution
+        else:
+            parent_ways = acc[p]
+            for k in range(m):
+                parent_ways[k] = parent_ways[k] * contribution[k] % MOD
+
+        indegree[p] -= 1
+        if indegree[p] == 0:
+            queue.append(p)
+
+    # Every remaining component is a directed cycle. Inequalities around a
+    # cycle force all its vertices to have the same value.
+    answer = 1
+    seen = [False] * n
+    for start in range(n):
+        if indegree[start] == 0 or seen[start]:
+            continue
+
+        cycle = []
+        v = start
+        while not seen[v]:
+            seen[v] = True
+            cycle.append(v)
+            v = parent[v]
+
+        cycle_ways = [1] * m
+        for v in cycle:
+            if acc[v] is None:
+                continue
+            subtree_ways = acc[v]
+            for k in range(m):
+                cycle_ways[k] = cycle_ways[k] * subtree_ways[k] % MOD
+
+        answer = answer * (sum(cycle_ways) % MOD) % MOD
+
+    print(answer)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    solve()
*** End Patch

attributes.event.name: codex.tool_result
attributes.arguments:
{"cmd":"python3 - << 'PY'
import io
import itertools
import random
import sys
import solution

rng = random.Random(387)
real_in, real_out = sys.stdin, sys.stdout
for case in range(300):
    n = rng.randint(1, 7)
    m = rng.randint(1, 4)
    a = [rng.randrange(n) for _ in range(n)]

    expected = 0
    for x in itertools.product(range(1, m + 1), repeat=n):
        if all(x[i] <= x[a[i]] for i in range(n)):
            expected += 1

    data = f"{n} {m}\n" + " ".join(str(v + 1) for v in a) + "\n"
    wrapped = io.TextIOWrapper(io.BytesIO(data.encode()))
    output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdin, sys.stdout = wrapped, output
    solution.solve()
    actual = int(output.getvalue())
    if actual != expected:
        sys.stdin, sys.stdout = real_in, real_out
        raise SystemExit(
            f"Mismatch case={case} n={n} m={m} a={a}: "
            f"expected={expected}, actual={actual}"
        )

sys.stdin, sys.stdout = real_in, real_out
print("300 randomized exhaustive checks passed")
PY","workdir":"/Users/james/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Code/live-code-bench/LiveCodeBench/native-codex-gpt-5.6-sol-ultrafast-q1-inference-2026-07-13_143151/q1_abc387_f","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}

import io
import resource
import sys
import time
import solution

start = time.perf_counter()

elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
print(f"elapsed={elapsed:.3f}s maxrss={resource.getrusage(resource.RUSAGE_SELF).ru_maxrss}", file=sys.stderr)

import sys
from collections import deque


MOD = 998244353


def solve() -> None:
    input = sys.stdin.buffer.readline
    n, m = map(int, input().split())
    parent = [x - 1 for x in map(int, input().split())]

    # indegree[v] is the number of vertices whose outgoing edge ends at v.
    # Repeatedly removing indegree-zero vertices leaves exactly the cycles.
    indegree = [0] * n
    for v in parent:
        indegree[v] += 1

    queue = deque(i for i in range(n) if indegree[i] == 0)

from collections import deque


MOD = 998244353


def solve() -> None:
    input = sys.stdin.buffer.readline
